review_reason: Core group structure and task relation proven sorry-free, but AddCommGroup/LinearOrder/IsOrderedAddMonoid blocked on mathematical properties (freeness, Holder's theorem) that require dedicated future tasks. TaskFrame assembly depends on these unproven instances.

artifacts.summary: Translation group D = Additive(T ≃o T) with AddGroup, action, task_rel properties (sorry-free)
Detailed implementation summary with blockers and recommendations

partial_progress.details: TranslationGroup.lean created and builds successfully with zero sorries. AddGroup, action properties (apply_zero, apply_add, neg cancellation, injectivity, monotonicity), and TaskFrame relation properties (nullity, compositionality, determinism, reversibility) all proven. Blocked on: (1) freeness/rigidity for LinearOrder on D, (2) Holder's theorem for AddCommGroup, (3) homogeneity for AddTorsor. These are genuine mathematical open problems for the canonical timeline.

errors.message: Plan's Strategy C (formal differences T x T / ~) abandoned because equivalence relation well-definedness requires homogeneity - the same property that blocks all approaches. Used Additive(T ≃o T) instead.
errors.recommendation: Revise plan to use Additive(T ≃o T) approach and add dedicated phases for freeness/Holder proofs

errors.message: DovetailingChain.lean cannot be archived - actively imported by TemporalCoherentConstruction.lean for temporal_coherent_family_exists_theorem
errors.recommendation: Archive DovetailingChain only after its replacement is complete and imported

errors.message: SMulCommClass (Equiv.Perm (Fin 3)) (Equiv.Perm (Fin 3)) (Fin 3) is unsound - allows proving False. The generic AddTorsor instance for Additive(alpha ≃o alpha) is affected.
errors.recommendation: Report to Mathlib maintainers. Avoid using this instance.

completion_data.completion_summary: Created TranslationGroup.lean defining D = Additive(T ≃o T) with sorry-free proofs of AddGroup, action properties, and TaskFrame relation axioms (nullity, compositionality). Blocked on AddCommGroup/LinearOrder/IsOrderedAddMonoid which require freeness and Holder's theorem proofs.
